properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hear the Lord of harvest sweetly calling. “Who will go and work for Me today? Who will bring to Me the lost and dying? Who will point them to the narrow way?”

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Speak, my Lord, speak my Lord, Speak, and I’ll be quick to answer Thee; Speak, my Lord, speak, my Lord, Speak, and I will answer, “Lord, send me.”

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the coal of fire touched the prophet, Making him as pure as pure can be. When the voice of God, said “Who’ll go for us?” The he answered, “Here I am, send me.”

verse.name: v4
v5
